- After LEFT: player at cols 15-16, target at col 14

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find green blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

green = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"Green nodes: {len(green)}")
for n in green:
    b = n['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    print(f"  pixels={n['pixels']}, rows={min_r}-{max_r}, cols={min_c}-{max_c}")

# Try clicking on the first green block
if green:
    g = green[0]
    b = g['boundary']
    min_r = min(p[0] for p in b)
    max_r = max(p[0] for p in b)
    min_c = min(p[1] for p in b)
    max_c = max(p[1] for p in b)
    center_r = (min_r + max_r) // 2
    center_c = (min_c + max_c) // 2
    print(f"\nClicking on green block at ({center_r}, {center_c})")
    action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': center_r, 'col': center_c}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
